behaviors.behavior: header bootstrap does NOT clobber a tracked store a concurrent producer created+populated in the window between the existence probe and the write (CodeQL js/file-system-race #292 root cause)
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.fs-race.test.ts::'does not clobber a tracked store a concurrent producer wrote after the existence check' PASSED (RED before fix: producer append record truncated; GREEN after)

behaviors.behavior: fresh-file bootstrap still writes the schema header + the status event when the tracked store is genuinely absent (regression guard)
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.fs-race.test.ts::'still bootstraps the schema header when the tracked store is genuinely absent' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: termination-guard / newline / zero-byte / CRLF / outbox-routing behavior of appendStatusEvent is unchanged
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.newline.test.ts (6) + triage-write.test.ts + triage-store{,.recovery,.union}.test.ts all PASSED (full server suite 2796)

behaviors.behavior: parent-dir creation made unconditional mkdir -p (idempotent) produces the same result as the prior existsSync-guarded mkdir
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.test.ts::'creates parent directory + header when triage.jsonl does not exist' PASSED (full suite green)

surface_verification.justification: Server-internal write-path hardening: appendStatusEvent's schema-header bootstrap now uses atomic exclusive-create (writeFileSync flag 'wx') instead of an existsSync check-then-write, closing a first-write TOCTOU (CodeQL js/file-system-race #292) that could truncate a tracked triage.jsonl a Python producer wrote in the race window. The function's observable output (the JSONL the Triage board reads) is byte-identical for every non-race input; the race outcome is data-loss PREVENTION, deterministically covered by a unit test that reproduces the lost race via a steered existsSync. No UI/API/message-contract change and no client/** touched, so there is no browser surface to exercise; the full server suite (2796 passed) exercises the triage reader + route consumer chain confirming unchanged output.
